# TravelPlanner Fixture Root

This is the tiny committed TravelPlanner fixture used by the public GitHub repo
for tests and smoke checks.

It is intentionally small:

- one destination city
- one accommodation
- a few restaurants
- one attraction
- a minimal distance table
- an empty flights table

For full official TravelPlanner evaluation, point `PRISM_TRAVELPLANNER_ROOT` at
a complete local TravelPlanner checkout instead of this fixture.
